name: REPLACE_WITH_DATASET_NAME
title: REPLACE — short human-readable title
description: REPLACE — what this dataset covers (period, region, source type) and why it is its own package rather than merged into another (CONTRIBUTING §1.3).

fields.name: record_id
fields.title: Record ID
fields.description: Stable unique identifier. Never reused. Replace the pattern prefix below with a short dataset code.

fields.name: example_amount_original
fields.title: TEMPLATE — Amount (as written)
fields.description: OPTIONAL PATTERN, delete if not applicable — include only if this dataset records monetary amounts (CONTRIBUTING §4). Original figure in its source unit; pairs with example_amount_unit and example_amount_normalized.

fields.name: example_amount_unit
fields.title: TEMPLATE — Original unit
fields.description: OPTIONAL PATTERN, delete if not applicable — unit of example_amount_original.

fields.name: example_amount_normalized
fields.title: TEMPLATE — Amount (normalised)
fields.description: OPTIONAL PATTERN, delete if not applicable — example_amount_original converted to one common unit for comparability. The conversion applied is named in example_normalization_method, auditable per row.

fields.name: example_normalization_method
fields.title: TEMPLATE — Normalisation method
fields.description: OPTIONAL PATTERN, delete if not applicable — the exact conversion applied (e.g. 'identity', a named rate with its source, or '.NA' where nothing was converted).

fields.name: example_missingness
fields.title: TEMPLATE — Missingness (of amount)
fields.description: OPTIONAL PATTERN, delete if not applicable — needed only when a field must distinguish a true source-recorded zero (a value) from the other kinds of absence, which the missingValues tokens already cover.

fields.name: example_term_original
fields.title: TEMPLATE — Term (original script)
fields.description: OPTIONAL PATTERN, delete if not applicable — include only if the source is not in English (CONTRIBUTING §4, source language preserved). Original term, kept separate from its romanisation and gloss.

fields.name: example_term_romanised
fields.title: TEMPLATE — Term (romanised)
fields.description: OPTIONAL PATTERN, delete if not applicable — romanisation of example_term_original.

fields.name: example_term_gloss
fields.title: TEMPLATE — Term (gloss)
fields.description: OPTIONAL PATTERN, delete if not applicable — English gloss of example_term_original. Where a term's referent shifts across periods, record the shift in the logbook rather than smoothing it over.

fields.name: source_ref
fields.title: Source reference
fields.description: Archive/series call number and folio (or equivalent), keyed to the logbook.

fields.name: source_lang
fields.title: Source language
fields.description: ISO 639-1 language code of the source text.

fields.name: confidence
fields.title: Record confidence
fields.description: Overall confidence in the coded record. Uncertainty is an explicit column, not prose.

fields.name: coder
fields.title: Coder
fields.description: Initials of the team member who entered the record (CONTRIBUTING §2).

fields.name: notes
fields.title: Notes
fields.description: Free-text coder note: rationale, caveats, cross-references.
